headline: How Walmart (WMT) Is Rewriting Its Story With AI Hype And Valuation Questions
summary: Walmart’s fair value estimate in one model has shifted slightly higher to about US$136.02 per share from US$135.90, a small adjustment that keeps the price target range tightly clustered. That kind of move lines up with a split analyst view, where more bullish voices point to Q4 beats and the tech enabled model, while cautious analysts focus on softer guidance and questions around upside. As you read on, you will see how these competing narratives are forming and what to watch as they...
